title: Positron Rifles
wikitext:
[]: Positron Rifles             Quote Post by Shnooks » Sun Dec 04, 2005 3:45 pm Okay, so... In Episode 5, Ritsuko says the angels consist of solidified light. Light is made of photons, which is a wave or a particle. Sooo...Why in the world would they possibly use a positron rifle to defeat the angels? For people who dont know what a positron is, a positron is an anti-particle of an electron, and it has a positive charge. Well, if they shot positrons at at angel, it wouldnt really destroy matter but add matter on. And that is IF the positrons didnt react with the electrons in the air. So, why would they possibly attack with position rifles? And, if it can go through an AT feild and annihilate it, does that mean the AT feilds are electrons?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Dec 04, 2005 3:57 pm I'll try to clarify this a bit. A positron, as Shnooks said, is an electrons anti-particle. When an electron and a positron collide they annhilate each other and release 2m(c^2) joules of energy. A weapon which fires a stream of positrons (As the positron rifle does) would be an incredibly effective weapon against being composed of normal matter. BUT! According to Ritsuko in #6: [code:1] Ritsuko: You are correct. We do know the Angel is composed of matter which has the properties of both particles and waves, just like light. [/code:1] Hmm. A positron stream fired at such a material should, AFAIK, not really have much effect beyond the physical impacts of the positrons themself (which wouldn't be much). Of course, this is assuming that Shamsel and Ramiel are both made of the same sort of material, but I don't really see any reason to assume otherwise. Now, against AT Fields, I don't know. They demonstrate some incredibly funky properties, and I have no idea how a positron stream would interact with them. However, IIRC, when Rei fires at Arael the postrons explode on contact with it's ATF, which is quite odd. Very odd, actually, since it seems to indicate that AT fields are composed of electrons. Which is incredibly bizzare. :? There's also the problem that the positron stream should start reacting with the electrons in the air as soon as it leaves the rifle, but NERV seems to have dealt with that.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Dec 04, 2005 6:16 pm Not too sure about positrons, but for an example of the effectiveness of streams of electrons, see tazers, and electric fences.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Mon Dec 05, 2005 9:20 am as is said in the back of special edition.......volume 7 i think; a positron rifle would only work in a vacuum i.e. space, where particles don't interfere with direction and so on of the beam. this leaves me bewilded to what the reason for its use is.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Dec 05, 2005 11:22 am ice reaper wrote: as is said in the back of special edition.......volume 7 i think; a positron rifle would only work in a vacuum i.e. space, where particles don't interfere with direction and so on of the beam. this leaves me bewilded to what the reason for its use is.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Mon Dec 05, 2005 1:46 pm EVA ain't exactly what you would call a hard SF show, but I submit it has the coolest gobbledygook. â€”C. "Shinji! Do you know this pervert?" â€”Asuka, referring to Kaworu, manga Vol. 9

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Dec 06, 2005 3:06 pm Space Penis wrote: [code:1]Ritsuko: You are correct. We do know the Angel is composed of matter which has the properties of both particles and waves, just like light. [/code:1]

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Dec 06, 2005 3:18 pm What does "lightbody" mean? Since she doesn't qualify it in any way, one would assume that she's talking about normal light, which dies indeed have qualities of a wave and a particle.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Dec 06, 2005 3:22 pm A lightbody can mean many things, but from my perspective a lightbody is the literal physical manifestation of a soul (which is made from fibres of â€˜lightâ€˜, that is, divine light) rather than the other way around (the vessel is made, then the soul gets chucked in there, so to speak).

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Dec 06, 2005 3:26 pm Zugzwang wrote: A lightbody can mean many things, but from my perspective a lightbody is the literal physical manifestation of a soul (which is made from fibres of ‘light‘, that is, divine light) rather than the other way around (the vessel is made, then the soul gets chucked in there, so to speak).

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Dec 06, 2005 3:31 pm Space Penis wrote: Zugzwang wrote: A lightbody can mean many things, but from my perspective a lightbody is the literal physical manifestation of a soul (which is made from fibres of â€˜lightâ€˜, that is, divine light) rather than the other way around (the vessel is made, then the soul gets chucked in there, so to speak).

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Dec 06, 2005 3:44 pm Sooooo....You were just posting random shit that you don't have any support for at all? Concession accepted.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Dec 06, 2005 3:55 pm Space Penis wrote: Sooooo....You were just posting random shit that you don't have any support for at all? Concession accepted.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Dec 06, 2005 4:25 pm I have grown a field of wheat that I have recently harvested. There is a man in the neighbouring field who hadnâ€™t bothered to grow anything at all. He arrives at my front door one morning and asks me if he can have some of my harvest, I tell him that I helped him to sow the seeds so he would have a bountiful supply, if only he worked on his field and nurtured his plants so he would have something to eat during the winter months. So why should I help this irresponsible person when it risks my food supply to? Putting us both at risk. That is the way I work, but with information. I have no burden at all, it is you who has the burden, and is projecting it on me. I have planted the 'seeds', you just haven't noticed/bothered with your 'field' yet. You may think that mine is the only 'field' around, so you try to steal from it, walking over your own 'field' in the process to reach mine, and that is when you become a parasite. That is the best way I can desrcibe what often happens to me/others like me on this planet. It is happening on all levels of reality. Even here! As has been proved by this post and a few others here, as well as from my personal experience.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Dec 06, 2005 4:32 pm You're a fucking moron.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Dec 06, 2005 4:41 pm Space Penis wrote: You're a fucking moron.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Dec 06, 2005 4:53 pm Zugzwang wrote: That is exactly the type of response I would expect, in that, no counterargument

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Dec 06, 2005 5:06 pm Space Penis wrote: Zugzwang wrote: That is exactly the type of response I would expect, in that, no counterargument
